persona.name: Craving-Control Struggler
persona.pain_en: Daily cravings break every weight plan.
persona.desire_en: Steady appetite control without feeling deprived.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs visible early control over snack urges.
persona.pain_hi: रोज की cravings से routine टूट जाता है।
persona.desire_hi: भूखे बिना weight-loss routine निभाना है।
persona.friction_hi: सिर्फ willpower पर plan टिकता नहीं।
persona.proof_needed_hi: शुरुआत में ही cravings control का भरोसेमंद proof चाहिए।

EN.headline: Cravings down. Weight loss feels easier.
EN.support_line: Doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system designed to help you lose 3 to 5 kg with 1 Kit without feeling hungry, weak, or out of control.

persona.name: Busy Professional
persona.pain_en: Work schedule leaves no room for complex routines.
persona.desire_en: Simple weight routine that fits packed days.
persona.friction_en: Meal prep and long workouts are not sustainable.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs a low-effort protocol that still shows progress.
persona.pain_hi: काम के बीच complex routine निभाना मुश्किल है।
persona.desire_hi: busy schedule में चलने वाला simple weight-loss routine चाहिए।
persona.friction_hi: meal prep और long workouts टिकाऊ नहीं हैं।
persona.proof_needed_hi: कम effort वाला practical protocol चाहिए जो result दिखाए।

persona.name: Emotional Eater / Stress Snacker
persona.pain_en: Stress triggers emotional snacking at random times.
persona.desire_en: Calmer eating with fewer stress-led cravings.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs believable support during emotional triggers.
persona.pain_hi: stress में emotional snacking बढ़ जाती है।
persona.desire_hi: कम cravings और calmer eating चाहिए।
persona.friction_hi: stressful moments में plan टूट जाता है।
persona.proof_needed_hi: emotional triggers के समय workable support चाहिए।

persona.name: Plateau Victim
persona.pain_en: Weight loss plateaus despite repeated effort.
persona.desire_en: Break stagnation with a clear daily system.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs a trackable, structured restart path.
persona.pain_hi: मेहनत के बाद भी weight-loss plateau हो जाता है।
persona.desire_hi: clear daily system से progress फिर शुरू करनी है।
persona.friction_hi: बार-बार plateau से motivation गिर जाती है।
persona.proof_needed_hi: trackable और structured restart proof चाहिए।

persona.name: PCOD Support Seeker

persona.desire_en: Steadier weight progress with manageable routine.
persona.friction_en: Fear of harsh or unsafe methods.
persona.pain_hi: PCOD context में weight loss ज्यादा tough लगता है।
persona.desire_hi: manageable routine के साथ steady progress चाहिए।
persona.friction_hi: harsh या unsafe methods का डर रहता है।
persona.proof_needed_hi: non-cure और compliant framing के साथ भरोसा चाहिए।
